name: Favorite Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the butter until creamy. Gradually add the peanut butter, then the brown sugar, and then the granulated sugar. Beat in the eggs, followed by the vanilla.
2. In another bowl, mix together the flour and baking soda. Gradually incorporate this into the butter mixture, stirring thoroughly. Form the dough into 1-inch balls and place them about 2 inches apart on greased baking sheets. Press each ball down with a fork to create a crisscross pattern using the fork tines.
3. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until golden brown. Allow to cool on the baking sheets for about one minute before transferring to wire racks to cool completely. Store in an airtight container. Makes about 7 dozen.
